title: Fiche de test - Data Analyst Packaging Tool SPM
job_description: Mission BI/Data project management for SPM project: create and enhance dashboard for SPM project using Power BI, Excel and eventually Foundry. Data available in dedicated business application SPM / iTMS via Excel extract or in datalake Snowflake + Azure. Lead data workstream: clarify business needs and ensure they are covered by IT solution in terms of data and KPI/dashboard. Provide associated documentation.

criteria.label: Competences obligatoires
criteria.description: Mesure la presence des outils et competences indispensables de la fiche de poste SPM.

criteria.label: Experience BI/Data et projet
criteria.description: Valorise les experiences de BI, dashboards, clarification de besoins et pilotage de workstream data.

criteria.label: Competences souhaitees metier
criteria.description: Mesure l'alignement avec Foundry, supply chain, transport, automotive et packaging flow management.

criteria.label: Coherence globale du profil
criteria.description: Evalue la coherence generale, l'autonomie, la communication bilingue et la capacite de documentation.
